title: Aspirin tablets measured dose / retail — heading 3004 Free
source: CROSS NY K87058 (21 Jun 2004) — children’s aspirin tablets and enteric-coated aspirin tablets → 3004.90.9128, rate of duty Free. Pairs with NY 890808 bulk aspirin (non-Free Chapter 29).

value_note.contrast: Bulk aspirin NY 890808 is non-Free MFN on Chapter 29 — real dollar delta if preference does not erase it
